mapper.select:
SELECT ROUND(rst.PRDCT_PWR*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE, 2) AS 'allPwi' FROM TB_PEAK_PWR_PRDCT_RST rst, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE pti.MNTR_YN ='1' AND pti.IS_ALL='1' AND rst.CNFRM_TIME > #{nowDate} AND rst.CNFRM_TIME <=
(#{nowDate} + INTERVAL 15 MINUTE)
(#{nowDate} + INTERVAL 75 MINUTE)
ORDER BY rst.CNFRM_TIME DESC limit 1;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_EMS_ALR (ALR_TYP, ALR_TIME, AI_WEB, AI_SCADA, EMS_WEB, EMS_SCADA, PMS_WEB, PMS_SCADA, MSG, LINK, RGSTR_TIME, UPDT_TIME, FLAG) VALUES ( #{alr_typ}, #{nowDate}, "0", "0", "1", "1", "0", "0", #{msg}, #{link}, #{nowDate}, NULL, '1' );
mapper.select: SELECT ALR_ID, ALR_TIME, ALR_TYP, MSG, LINK FROM TB_EMS_ALR WHERE FLAG = '1' AND ALR_TIME >= DATE_FORMAT(#{nowDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE AND ALR_TIME <= DATE_FORMAT(#{nowDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') + INTERVAL 10 MINUTE ORDER BY ALR_ID DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_EMS_ALR SET FLAG = 3 WHERE FLAG = 1
mapper.select: select SUM(ROUND(rd.value*pti.PWI_UNIT_VALUE, 2)) AS 'allPwi' FROM TB_RAWDATA rd, TB_PEAK_TAG_INF pti WHERE rd.tagname = pti.PWI_TAG AND pti.MNTR_YN ='1' AND pti.IS_ALL='1' and rd.value != 0 AND ts >= (#{nowDate} - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AND ts <= #{nowDate} GROUP by rd.ts ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1
select DEFAULT_VALUE as alarm_use from TB_WPP_TAG_CODE where FUNC_TYP = 'PrdctAlarmUse'
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_EMS_ALR SET flag = '2' WHERE ALR_TYP = 'PEAK'
AND MSG = #{MSG}
mapper.select: select count(*) as cnt from TB_EMS_ALR where MSG = #{MSG} and FLAG = '2' and ALR_TIME >= DATE_FORMAT(#{nowDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') - INTERVAL 60 MINUTE AND ALR_TIME <= DATE_FORMAT(#{nowDate}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') + INTERVAL 10 MINUTE
